name: Alcove
description: MCP server that gives AI coding agents on-demand access to private project docs via BM25 ranked search. One setup for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini CLI, Copilot, Cline, and more. Docs stay private, never in public repos.

tools.name: search_project_docs
tools.description: BM25 ranked full-text search or grep fallback. Supports scope: "global" for cross-project search.

tools.name: get_project_docs_overview
tools.description: List all docs for the current project with classification and sizes.

tools.name: get_doc_file
tools.description: Read a specific doc file. Supports offset/limit for large files.

tools.name: list_projects
tools.description: Show all projects in the docs repo.

tools.name: audit_project
tools.description: Scan doc-repo and project repo, suggest actions for misplaced or missing docs.

tools.name: init_project
tools.description: Scaffold docs for a new project with standard templates.

tools.name: validate_docs
tools.description: Validate docs against team policy (policy.toml). Supports --format json and --exit-code.

tools.name: rebuild_index
tools.description: Rebuild the full-text search index manually.

tools.name: check_doc_changes
tools.description: Detect added, modified, or deleted docs since last index build.
